reviewFocus: Check whether each claim is supported by generic evidence labels.
Flag missing caveats when evidence is summarized, incomplete, or caller-owned.
Flag any claim that implies external action readiness without approval, release, or routing evidence.
Check that the result can be represented as the structured review-result contract.
Keep target selection, severity budgets, approval, routing, remediation, publication, and retention caller-owned.
outOfScope: Do not infer private facts, account details, source contents, production readiness, or external approval.
Do not decide publication, deployment, remediation ownership, tracker routing, retention, or real-world action.
Do not infer private repositories, issue trackers, products, companies, or domain programs from placeholder wording.
Do not treat generic evidence labels as proof outside this synthetic fixture.
